subject: English
title: Phonics Fun
tagline: Blend sounds together to decode and read words!

sampleItems.question: What sound do you hear first in 'cat'?
sampleItems.hint: Think back to what you learned about this topic.

sampleItems.question: Blend c-a-t together. What word do you get?
sampleItems.hint: Think back to what you learned about this topic.

sampleItems.question: What sound do you hear first in 'sun'?
sampleItems.hint: Think back to what you learned about this topic.

sampleItems.question: Blend s-u-n together. What word do you get?
sampleItems.hint: Think back to what you learned about this topic.

sampleItems.question: What sound do you hear last in 'dog'?
sampleItems.hint: Think back to what you learned about this topic.

sampleItems.question: Blend d-o-g together. What word do you get?
sampleItems.hint: Think back to what you learned about this topic.

sampleItems.question: What sound do you hear first in 'map'?

sampleItems.hint: Think back to what you learned about this topic.

sampleItems.question: What sound do you hear first in 'pig'?

sampleItems.question: Blend p-i-g together. What word do you get?
